plugins.name: Tunefish4
plugins.notes: Small VST3 profile useful for compatibility testing.

plugins.name: Qin_RV
plugins.notes: Installed from local_audio_assets\古风空音Kong Audio 2.2\Qin_RV_Setup_v2.2.exe. Library paths are written by E:\Kong Audio Library\Locate_Library_Here.exe into C:\VSTPlugins\KongAudio\Qin_RV.XML.

styles.name: Kong GaoHu Sus Leg MW

midi_policy.notes: For style-based Kong rendering, the style state selects the instrument/articulation. MIDI program/bank changes are removed so they cannot override the GUI-authored state. Pass midi_source_channel when rendering a multi-track MIDI.

styles.notes: Save from Carla GUI after loading C:\VSTPlugins\KongAudio\Qin_RV_x64.DLL, selecting ChineeGaoHu, and selecting 05 Sus_Leg_1_MW.

midi_policy.notes: For style-based Kong rendering, the style state selects the instrument/articulation. MIDI program/bank changes are removed so they cannot override the GUI-authored state. Pass midi_source_channel when rendering a multi-track MIDI.

styles.notes: Save from Carla GUI after loading C:\VSTPlugins\KongAudio\Qin_RV_x64.DLL, selecting ChineeGaoHu, and selecting Stac_1.
